content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms (from Topic A's ICM-based autonomous agents) can be repurposed to actively prioritize which new experiences a 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent stores in its long-term memory, filtering out low-information redundant data while retaining only high-surprise samples that improve generalization. This creates a self-sustaining memory curation loop that does not require human-labeled priority signals.
